name: obsidian-now
description: Type @ to open a date picker and insert an inline date, Notion-style.

scripts.build: npm run build -w obsidian-now-datecore && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.build:daemon: npm run build -w obsidian-now-datecore && npm run build -w obsidian-remind

author: netdex
